backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the TN FF BATTLE app, defining user profiles, coin balances, deposit requests, and tournament join/match management with admin authorization via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three frontend features (Tournament Entry page, routing/navigation, Admin Dashboard entries section) to their implementation files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, hooks, components, and admin panels for the TN FF BATTLE app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark CSS custom properties (design tokens) for colors, borders, and sidebar used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the TN FF BATTLE frontend, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (including /tournament-entry), wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and InternetIdentityProvider, and conditionally shows the ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Empty file placeholder for the AccessDeniedScreen admin component.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminPassw: Empty file placeholder for the AdminPasswordGuard component.
frontend/src/components/admin/DepositPas: Empty file placeholder for the DepositPasswordGuard component.
frontend/src/components/admin/DepositVer: Empty file placeholder for the DepositVerification admin component.
frontend/src/components/admin/DirectDepo: Empty file placeholder for the DirectDeposit admin component.
frontend/src/components/admin/JoinReques: Empty file placeholder for the JoinRequestsList admin component.
frontend/src/components/admin/MatchManag: Empty file placeholder for the MatchManagement admin component.
frontend/src/components/admin/Tournament: Empty file placeholder for the TournamentConfig admin component.
Empty file placeholder for the TournamentPasswordGuard component.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserManage: Empty file placeholder for the UserManagement admin component.
frontend/src/components/common/GamingBut: Reusable Free Fire-themed button component with primary, secondary, and danger variants and three sizes, featuring gradient backgrounds, glow shadows, and uppercase gaming typography.
frontend/src/components/common/GamingCar: A styled card component with optional orange/cyan glow effects and decorative battle-themed corner accents using Tailwind CSS.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Main layout wrapper that includes a fixed background image, Navigation, a content area, and a footer with a URL copy button and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: Sticky top navigation bar with links to Home, Dashboard, Wallet, and Tournament pages, plus Internet Identity login/logout handling and a mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time profile setup, collecting name and email and submitting them via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation with the user's Internet Identity principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile CRUD, balance fetching, deposits, and tournament join/admin operations with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useRetryConnection.ts: Hook that manages exponential-backoff retry logic for async operations, tracking retry count, delay, and error state with manual page-reload fallback.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a dark-themed Free Fire battle game color palette using CSS custom properties for backgrounds, primary/secondary colors, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays platform stats (users, balances, tournament info, deposit requests) and enforces authentication and admin-role access guards.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: User dashboard page showing wallet balance and tournament status, redirecting unauthenticated users to the login page.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with a hero section, feature highlights, and navigation buttons directing users to login or tournament/dashboard pages based on authentication state.
frontend/src/pages/LoginRegister.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity and redirects them to the dashboard upon successful login.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentEntry.tsx: Tournament registration page where authenticated users submit their player name and Free Fire Game ID, then get redirected to a payment URL after creating an order.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentPage.tsx: React page for joining a Free Fire tournament, displaying tournament status, entry fee, user balance, and a form to submit Free Fire UID and WhatsApp number. Redirects unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/pages/WalletDeposit.tsx: React page for depositing coins into a user's wallet via UPI payment, with actor connection validation, amount input, and payment detail display. Includes retry logic and detailed connection error handling.
frontend/src/utils/errorMessages.ts: Utility functions that categorize connection/actor errors into structured ErrorInfo objects with titles and suggestions, plus a helper to extract user-friendly deposit error messages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom Free Fire brand colors (ff-orange, ff-cyan, ff-gold), gaming fonts, glow box shadows, and animation keyframes using OKLCH color values.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking existing features and pending architectural requirements for a tournament entry payment system using ZAP UPI API, including backend endpoints, webhook verification, database schema, and slot management.
